verses.dev: सर्वांश्चाहूय सुग्रीवः प्लवगान् प्लवगर्षभः।समस्तानब्रवीद्भूयो रामकार्यर्थसिद्धयेएवमेतद्विचेतव्यं यन्मया परिकीर्तितम्।
verses.trans: Summoning the entire body of vanaras, Sugriva, the bull among monkeys, said, 'Go to the places I have described and look for Sita in order to fulfil Rama's objective'.

words.m: for fulfilling the objective of Rama

verses.dev: तदुग्रशासनं भर्तुर्विज्ञाय हरिपुङ्गवाःशलभा इव सञ्छाद्य मेदिनीं सम्प्रतस्थिरे।
verses.trans: Having understood Sugriva's strict orders, the forces of monkeys started moving. They spread like locusts all over the earth.

verses.dev: रामः प्रस्रवणे तस्मिन्यवसत्सहलक्ष्मणःप्रतीक्षमाणस्तं मासं यस्सीताधिगमे कृतः।
verses.trans: Rama accompanied by Lakshmana stayed back at Prasravana mountain looking forward for the expiry of the month fixed for the monkeys to trace Sita's whereabouts.

words.m: sin tracing the whereabouts of Sita

verses.dev: उत्तरां तु दिशं रम्यां गिरिराजसमावृताम्प्रतस्थे सहसा वीरो हरिश्शतवलिस्तदा।
verses.trans: Then the monkey warrior Satavali departed for the north, surrounded by kings of mountains.

verses.dev: पूर्वां दिशं प्रतिययौ विनतो हरियूथपःताराङ्गदादिसहितः प्लवङ्गो मारुतात्मजः।अगत्याचरितामाशां दक्षिणां हरियूथपः
verses.trans: Vinata, leader of the monkeys, set out for the eastern direction.The troop leader, son of the Windgod along with Angada and Tara left for the south inhabited by Agastya.

verses.dev: पूर्वां दिशं प्रतिययौ विनतो हरियूथपःताराङ्गदादिसहितः प्लवङ्गो मारुतात्मजः।अगत्याचरितामाशां दक्षिणां हरियूथपः
verses.trans: Vinata, leader of the monkeys, set out for the eastern direction.The troop leader, son of the Windgod along with Angada and Tara left for the south inhabited by Agastya.

verses.dev: पश्चिमां तु भृशं घोरां सुषेणः प्लवगेश्वरः।प्रतस्थे हरिशार्दूलो दिशं वरुणपालिताम्
verses.trans: 'The chieftain Sushena, tiger among the monkeys, started quickly for the fearsome western direction ruled by Varuna.

verses.dev: ततस्सर्वा दिशो राजा चोदयित्वा यथातथम्।कपिसेनापतीन्मुख्यान्मुमोद सुखितस्सुखम्
verses.trans: Sugriva, chief of the army of monkeys, having sent the leaders to all quarters felt relieved and rejoiced.

words.m: chief of the army of monkeys

verses.dev: एवं सम्बोधितास्सर्वे राज्ञा वानरयूथपाः।स्वां स्वां दिशमभिप्रत्त्य त्वरिता सम्प्रतस्थिरे
verses.trans: Addressed thus by the king, all the monkeys departed quickly from there for their respective directions with all enthusiasm.

verses.dev: नदन्तश्चोन्नदन्तश्च गर्जन्तश्च प्लवङ्गमाः।क्ष्वेलन्तो धावमानाश्च विनदन्तो महाबलाः
verses.trans: The powerful monkeys went gallopping and chattering, leaping and screaming.

verses.dev: एवं सम्बोदितास्सर्वे राज्ञा वानरयूथपाः।आनयिष्यामहे सीतां हनिष्यामश्च रावणम्
verses.trans: Thus addressed by the king, the leaders of the monkeys shouted, 'We will kill Ravana and get back Sita'.

verses.dev: अहमेको हनिष्यामि रावणं प्राप्तमाहवे।ततश्चोन्मथ्य सहसा हरिष्ये जनकात्मजाम्
verses.trans: 'I shall kill Ravana singlehanded in war and quickly get back Janaka's daughter churning (the enemy army).' (said one)

verses.dev: वेपमानां श्रमेणाद्य भवद्भिः स्थीयतामिति।एक एवाहरिष्यामि पातालादपि जानकीम्
verses.trans: 'I will alone restore Sita, exhausted and trembling (in fear), even from the nether world. Wait here' (said another leader).

words.m: even from the nether most world

verses.dev: वधिष्याम्यहं वृक्षान् दारयिष्याम्यहं गिरीन्।धरणीं दारयिष्यामि क्षोभयिष्यामि सागरान्
verses.trans: 'I will smash trees, shatter mountains, cleave the earth and churn up the seas'. (said a another).

verses.dev: अहं योजनसङ्ख्यायाः प्लविता नात्र संशयः।शतं योजनसङ्ख्यायाश्शतं समधिकं ह्यहम्
verses.trans: 'I can doubtless cross a distance of a hundred yojanas' said one. Another said,' I can leap a hundred yojanas more'.

words.m: cross a distance of hundred yojanas
